communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Indiana Access to Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Indiana Access to Public Records Act (Ind. Code § 5-14-3-1 et seq.), I request the following records relating to the homicide investigation of Hope Parks (August 2020), involving Michael Dale Parks. The case is fully closed following his guilty plea and 50-year sentence in May 2022.
I am specifically requesting:
	1.	Interview 1 (recorded police interview with Michael Dale Parks)
	2.	Interview 2 (recorded police interview with Michael Dale Parks)
	3.	Jail Interview (recorded interview with Michael Dale Parks conducted post-arrest)
I have already been in contact with the Crawfordsville Police Department records department and have received a price sheet quoting $150.00 per video for these three items ($450.00 total). I am based in the United Kingdom and unable to pay via cash or money order. I am requesting assistance processing this payment and obtaining these records.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Baruch Gideon Appahoh
